description.text: Get up and in to the fight by charging up and over the bridge or choose to flank along the sides of it. One Base.

ru.original: Get up and in to the fight by charging up and over the bridge or choose to flank along the sides of it. One Base.
ru.translation: Иди на врага в лобовую через мост или обходи его с флагов. Одна база.

es.original: Get up and in to the fight by charging up and over the bridge or choose to flank along the sides of it. One Base.
es.translation:
Flanquea el puente o atraviésalo.
Un núcleo.

de.original: Get up and in to the fight by charging up and over the bridge or choose to flank along the sides of it. One Base.
de.translation: Stürzt euch in den Kampf, indem ihr euch hoch über die Brücke katapultiert oder flankiert sie von allen Seiten. Eine Basis.

pt.original: Get up and in to the fight by charging up and over the bridge or choose to flank along the sides of it. One Base.
pt.translation: Entre na luta passando por cima da ponte ou siga pelos flancos. Uma Base.

fr.original: Get up and in to the fight by charging up and over the bridge or choose to flank along the sides of it. One Base.
fr.translation: Il est temps de monter au front ! Menez la charge sur le pont, ou attaquez par les flancs. Une base.
